title: INITIATE
A SIGNAL
hero.intro: Tell us what you need. If we can help, we'll tell you exactly what it costs and how fast we can ship.

sections.title: START WITH THE PROBLEM.
sections.body: Email signal@metafloor.in with: what needs to work, when you need it by, and what it's worth to you. No NDAs, no pitch decks. Just the problem.

sections.title: WE RESPOND WITHIN 24 HOURS.
sections.body: If it makes sense, we'll tell you straight. If it doesn't, we'll tell you that too — and maybe point you to someone who can help.
